info.title: HowiCC API
info.description: Contract-first API for syncing, storing, profiling, and rendering agent conversations. Browser integrations use Better Auth session cookies, while the CLI uses bearer tokens issued through the CLI auth exchange flow.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Operational endpoints for health and readiness checks.

tags.name: CLI Auth
tags.description: Browser-to-CLI authentication flows that mint bearer tokens for the CLI.

tags.name: Uploads
tags.description: Draft upload, asset transfer, and revision finalization endpoints used during sync.

tags.name: Conversations
tags.description: Authenticated read APIs for conversation summaries and render documents.

tags.name: Artifacts
tags.description: Artifact preview endpoints for the current conversation revision.

tags.name: Profiles
tags.description: Personal analytics and materialized session profile endpoints.

tags.name: Repositories
tags.description: Public aggregate analytics for repositories with shared sessions.

tags.name: Viewer
tags.description: Cookie-authenticated browser helper and smoke-test endpoints.

BearerAuth.description: CLI bearer token issued by the `/cli-auth/exchange` flow.

BrowserSession.name: __Secure-howicc.session_token
BrowserSession.description: Better Auth browser session cookie. Local HTTP development uses `howicc.session_token` without the `__Secure-` prefix.

blocks.description: Nested render blocks for the delegated subagent thread. The outer document carries the full discriminated block schema.

get.description: Reports whether the API worker is reachable and ready to serve requests.

post.summary: Create a one-time browser-authenticated CLI login grant
post.description: Creates a short-lived authorization grant for the local CLI login flow. The caller must already have a valid Better Auth browser session cookie.

post.summary: Exchange a one-time CLI auth code for an API token
post.description: Consumes a previously issued one-time CLI grant and returns a bearer token for subsequent CLI API calls.

get.summary: Resolve the current CLI token to the owning user
get.description: Validates the bearer token presented by the CLI and returns the owning user record.

post.summary: Create an upload session for a new revision
post.description: Starts a draft upload session for a conversation revision. The response includes the storage targets that the CLI should upload next.

put.summary: Upload asset bytes for a draft revision session
put.description: Uploads a single asset body for an existing draft upload session. Each asset kind must match a target announced by the initial session creation response.

200.description: Asset bytes stored for the draft upload session

404.description: Upload session or draft asset not found

post.description: Validates the uploaded assets, stores the new revision, and updates the conversation to point at the latest current revision.

get.summary: List conversations for the current user
get.description: Returns the current user's accessible conversations as lightweight list items for navigation and conversation selection.

get.summary: Get the current render document for a conversation
get.description: Returns the normalized render document for the conversation's current revision. The render document powers the viewer UI and downstream presentation layers.

get.summary: Fetch a conversation render document by public slug
get.description: Returns the normalized render document for a conversation identified by its share slug. Private conversations are only visible to the owner (authenticated via CLI bearer token or Better Auth session cookie); unlisted and public conversations are readable without auth. When multiple conversations share the same slug — a historical collision pending schema-level uniqueness — the most-recently-updated match is returned.

404.description: Slug does not resolve to a visible conversation

500.description: Shared render document resolution failed unexpectedly

patch.summary: Update the visibility of a conversation
patch.description: Flips a conversation between `private`, `unlisted`, and `public`. Only the owner may make this change. Accepts either a CLI bearer token or a Better Auth session cookie.

404.description: Conversation does not exist or is not owned by the caller

get.summary: Fetch an artifact payload for a conversation revision
get.description: Returns a text preview for a stored artifact associated with the current conversation revision.
Returns the latest normalized OpenRouter public pricing catalog snapshot cached by the API.

Returns the materialized cross-session profile for the current user. The endpoint accepts either a CLI bearer token or a Better Auth browser session cookie. If the user has not synced any digests yet, the API returns `profile: null` with `digestCount: 0` instead of a 404.

200.description: User profile or an empty state when no synced sessions exist yet

401.description: The caller is not authenticated with either bearer token or browser session cookie

get.summary: Get lightweight stats for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns a compact snapshot of the current user's profile — session count, total cost, total duration, active days, and current streak. Designed for dashboard headers where the full `/profile` payload is too heavy. If no digests exist yet, `stats` is `null` with `digestCount: 0`.

200.description: Profile stats snapshot or an empty state when no synced sessions exist yet

401.description: The caller is not authenticated with either bearer token or browser session cookie

get.summary: Paginated activity feed for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns the authenticated user's synced sessions ordered by session creation time (newest first). Used by the web dashboard feed and the `/sessions` list. Pagination is cursor-based: pass the previous response's `nextCursor` to continue.

schema.description: Pass `nextCursor` from the previous response. ISO 8601 timestamp — items strictly before it are returned.

parameters.description: Pass `nextCursor` from the previous response. ISO 8601 timestamp — items strictly before it are returned.
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Number of items to return (1–50). Defaults to 20.

parameters.description: Number of items to return (1–50). Defaults to 20.
parameters.name: limit

200.description: A page of activity items plus an optional `nextCursor` for the next page

401.description: The caller is not authenticated with either bearer token or browser session cookie

post.description: Forces a fresh profile aggregation from the current conversation digests for the authenticated user. This is useful after a sync or when debugging stale profile materializations.

401.description: The caller is not authenticated with either bearer token or browser session cookie

get.summary: Get the public aggregate profile for a repository
get.description: Aggregates the current public conversation digests for the requested repository across all users. Only conversations whose current revision is publicly visible are included in the result.

200.description: Repository profile or an empty state when no public sessions exist

400.description: The repository owner or name contains unsupported characters

get.summary: Get the current browser viewer session
get.description: Returns a safe summary of the current Better Auth browser session. This endpoint is intended for SSR helpers, auth debugging, and browser-only integrations that need to confirm whether a session cookie is active.

200.description: Current viewer session summary or an unauthenticated empty state

get.summary: Load the protected viewer smoke-test page
get.description: Returns a simple HTML page when the current browser session is authenticated. This route exists to smoke-test cookie-based auth from the web app and local environments.

200.description: Protected HTML content rendered for an authenticated browser session

401.description: The browser session is missing or invalid
